title: PCSK9 gRNA amplification template PCR
steps: Prepare the PCR Mix as follows and divide into 4 tubes with 50μL each: %s %s Reagent Amount H2O 148 μL L2 4 μL 50x T7+F+R mix 8 μL 10 mM DNTPs 4 μL GC buffer 40 μL Phusion 2 μL
Thermocycler (gRNA Amp protocol): %s %s temp time 98 °C 30 s 98 °C 10 s 57 °C 10 s 72 °C 10 s Repeat step 2-4, 30 times 72 °C 2 min 4 °C hold
Create 50x T7+F+R mix by combining 50 uM L2 complement oligo, 1mM T7 fwd primer, and 1 mM T7 rev primer in a 2:1:1 ratio
NanoDrop to confirm concentration (should be ~150 ng/uL)
creator: Noreen Wauford
